name: token-monitor
description: Live token & cost widget for Claude Code, Codex & Hermes — local-first, optional multi-device sync.

scripts.check: node --check src/hub/server.js && node --check src/agent/agent.js && node --check src/shared/collector.js && node --check src/shared/config.js && node --check src/shared/http.js && node --check src/shared/limitCollector.js && node --check src/shared/limits.js && node --check src/shared/usage.js && node --check src/electron/main.js && node --check src/electron/preload.js && node --check src/electron/renderer/app.js && node --check worker/src/index.js

author: Javis
